headline: Nuvo Launches the Accounts Receivable Suite, Becoming the AI-Native Order-to-Cash Network for the Physical Goods Economy
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 02, 2026--Nuvo, the AI-native order-to-cash network for the physical goods economy, today launched its Accounts Receivable Suite. The release extends Nuvo across the full order-to-cash lifecycle, with onboarding, credit, payments, collections, and cash application now operating as one interconnected system on a single verified trade network.
